name: @mos/cli
description: The mos CLI: serve any vault's board and wiki locally (`mos serve`, ADR-012) and scaffold a new vault (`mos init`, ADR-013). Read-only over existing vaults (ADR-002); ships the built web app bundled with the vault endpoints in one Node process.

scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target node --external chokidar && node scripts/copy-web-dist.mjs
